title: Hellim's Xaero's Maps Mob Icons
description: Its add the Missing mobs and Modded mobs Icons to Xaero's Maps.
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/KqXOuDj.png) ![](https://i.imgur.com/zOQqIom.png) ## **🟥Hellim's Projects - Hellim's Xaero's Maps Mob Icons**

This ResourcePack was created to add Mob icons missing from Xaero's Minimap and WorldMap. Besides vanilla Minecraft mobs, it also supports mobs added to the game with Popular Mods. It will be made compatible for Mods regularly over time.

## **❗This resourcepack requires Xaero's Minimap and World Map.** * [Xaero's World Map](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map) * [Xaero's Minimap](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap) ![](https://i.imgur.com/I0f2yHa.png)
Show List
  1. Ad Astra
  2. Adventurez
  3. Alex's Caves - With KYO
  4. Alex's Mobs
  5. Acuaculture 2
  6. Aquamirae
  7. Ars Nouveau
  8. Artifacts
  9. Better Animals Plus
  10. BetterEND
  11. BetterNETHER
  12. Bewitchment
  13. Biome Makeover
  14. Blue Skies
  15. Bosses of Mass Destruction
  16. Born in Chaos - by Escorpiantony & robopop15
  17. Capybara Mod
  18. Cataclysm - by KYO
  19. Creatures of the Jungle
  20. Creatures of the Snow
  21. Creeper Overhaul
  22. Critters n' Crawlers
  23. Deeper and Darker
  24. Duckling
  25. Earth
  26. Enderman Overhaul
  27. Forbidden Arcanus
  28. Friends and Foes
  29. Frostiful
  30. Galosphere
  31. Golem Overhaul
  32. Iron's Spells n SpellBooks - by KYO
  33. Knight Quest
  34. Legendary Creatures
  35. Let's Do Vinery
  36. LUMINOUS: NETHER - by L200 & Contributed by RipleysMods
  37. LUMINOUS: OVERWORLD - by L200 & Contributed by RipleysMods
  38. Naturalist
  39. Quark
  40. Ribbits
  41. Royal Variants
  42. Savage and Ravage
  43. Tide
  44. The Graveyard
  45. The Twilight Forest
  46. Vanilla Backport: Chase the Skies, The Garden Awakens
  47. Whisper Woods

❗You can suggest mods for us to add to Resourcepack. For this, come to our Discord server or comment.❗
